⚡ F.U.S.E.™ Failure Understanding Simulation Engine
CircuiTry3D
💥
⚡ EXPLOSION HAZARD ⚡
AC and DC power sources cannot be directly connected!

Connecting an AC source (alternating current, ~120 V / 60 Hz) directly to a DC battery creates a catastrophic short circuit. In the real world this would cause an immediate explosion, fire, and destruction of every component in the circuit.

Why? AC and DC operate on fundamentally different principles. A DC battery provides a steady voltage while an AC source reverses polarity 60 times per second. Bridging them directly produces enormous surge currents that no component can survive.

Remove one of the power sources or add the proper conversion circuitry (rectifier, transformer, or power-supply circuit) before connecting them.

Edit Component

CircuiTry3D
👥 For Everyone — to facilitate and enhance the learning
Quick Start Guide

Welcome to CircuiTry3D ⚡

🚀 Getting Started
  • 🔋Add a Battery (B) as your power source
  • ⚡Add Resistors (R), LEDs (L), and other components from the Components menu
  • 〰️Press W for Wire Mode — tap terminals to connect components and complete the circuit
  • 📊Watch the W.I.R.E. panel on the right for live Voltage, Current & Power readings
🎨 Color-Coded Values
Voltage (Volts)
Current (Amps)
Resistance (Ω)
Power (Watts)
🕹️ Controls
  • ✋Drag to move components · Long-press / right-click to edit values
  • 🔍Pinch / scroll wheel to zoom · Two-finger drag / middle-drag to pan
  • ⌨️B Battery  ·  R Resistor  ·  L LED  ·  S Switch  ·  W Wire

Rollout playbook

  1. 01

    Discovery & Goal Setting

    Share your outcomes, roster counts, and timelines so we can scope the subscription tier that fits best.

  2. 02

    Pilot With Lead Classrooms

    Launch a focused pilot with a small teacher cohort and capture quick feedback on access, pacing, and support needs.

  3. 03

    Campus-Wide Launch

    Provision remaining seats, finalize billing, and host an all-staff enablement session to kick off the program.

  4. 04

    Measure & Expand

    Review usage analytics, celebrate wins, and plan the next phase - additional campuses, certifications, or advanced bundles.

Common questions

How do we purchase educator seats?

Start with a discovery call so we can confirm seat counts and billing cadence. We issue invoices or purchase orders.

Can we mix monthly and annual billing?

Educator plans can mix terms. Many districts choose annual licensing for core staff plus monthly add-ons during summer academies.

Do you support purchase orders or vendor onboarding?

Yes. We provide W-9, vendor packets, and Net 30 invoicing. Our team coordinates with your procurement office to simplify onboarding.

How is student data handled?

CircuiTry3D stores minimal student data, encrypts it in transit and at rest, and supports district SSO. Review our privacy policy or request a data-sharing agreement.

Ready to activate your subscription?

Start in the sandbox today or schedule a planning call to customize your rollout, invoicing, and training needs.
